title: Bedwars Optimized
description: A lightweight modpack for maximum FPS and smooth gameplay in Bedwars and PvP without any bloat
body:
# What does this modpack do? **Bedwars Optimized** is a **lightweight**, **high-performance** Forge 1.8.9 client modpack built for **maximum FPS**, **smooth combat**, and a **clean PvP experience**. Designed specifically for **Bedwars**, **duels**, and **competitive gameplay** on servers like **Hypixel** without adding any **bloat**. ## 📝 Notes: - This modpack requires OptiFine to function properly and to achieve maximum FPS. Due to legal reasons, OptiFine cannot be bundled directly with the modpack. You will need to download and install it manually. - Made for Forge 1.8.9 - Multiplayer-safe (Hypixel friendly) - No gameplay-changing mods or cheats - Light on RAM and perfect for low-end systems
📦 Full Modlist - **PolySprint** – by Polyfrost Toggle sprint and sneak mod for Minecraft 1.8.9 and 1.12.2 - **No Hurt Cam** – by ilofizisinsane Removes that pesky hurt camera - **AutoGG Reimagined** – by QWERTZexe Automatically says “gg” at the end of games in hypixel. - **PolyCrosshair** – by Polyfrost An extremely customizable crosshair mod - **Overflow Particles** – by Polyfrost Advanced particles mod for 1.8.9 - **Canelex Keystrokes Revamp** – by Polyfrost Displays WASD/mouse input on screen - **EvergreenHUD** – by Polyfrost Improves your heads up display. - **Velox Caelo** – by nea89o OptiFine CIT performance optimizer for 1.8.9 - **PolyBlur** – by Polyfrost Apply motion blur in-game in way. - **Wavey Capes** – by tr7zw Makes capes wave and animate realistically. - **Raw Input** – by Chromatic Fixes mouse jittering and increases smoothness - **Overflow Animations** – by PolyFrost 1.7 and modern animations in 1.8 - **PolyPatcher** – by Polyfrost A Forge mod full of Vanilla bug fixes, Quality of Life improvements, and performance enhancements. - **Behind You v3** - by Polyfrost Allows looking behind you without pressing F5 twice.
